jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Myntra
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
